name: testing-bundle
description: Testing capability bundle: test-case-engineer (forward test case generation) + bug-analyzer (backward root cause analysis) + testing-bundle (router entry). Use when user needs any testing capability.

interface.shortDescription: Test case generation, bug root cause analysis, and testing workflows
interface.longDescription: Use this bundle for any testing capability: generating test cases from requirements, reviewing test cases, designing test strategies, or analyzing bug root causes with 5 Whys and fishbone diagrams.
